commits.commitMessage: fix: clarify `domain()` IDN limitation and reject Punycode labels
Document isoTimestamp regex fix for PostgreSQL compatibility
Update changelog, fix comments and add improve tests
fix(to-json-schema): convert domain action to JSON Schema pattern
fix: allow 13-digit Visa numbers in credit card validator
fix: allow narrower inputs or wider outputs
fix: make guard a transformation instead of validation
Fix CI and smaller refactoring of parseJSON and stringifyJson
